LanguageData.DW_Bullet_InfantryAutogun_VIII.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Infantry_Autogun_VIII.label: Columnus Mk VIII Infantry Autogun
LanguageData.DW_Infantry_Autogun_VIII.description: Well-regarded for their high rate of fire and sturdy construction, these autoguns are in short supply after a series of calamities befell the forge world of Graia.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Autopistol_III.label: Autopistol Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Shredder_Autopistol_III.label: Ius Shredder Autopistol Mk III
LanguageData.DW_Shredder_Autopistol_III.description: More popular with hive gangers than Moebian military forces, this autopistol's devastating rate of fire is near-legendary.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Revolver.label: Revolver bullet
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_Revolver_A.label: Revolver bullet
LanguageData.DW_Zarona_Revolver.label: Zarona Quickdraw Stub Revolver
LanguageData.DW_Zarona_Revolver.description: One of the most ancient pistol designs, stub revolvers endure across myriad frontier worlds thanks to their durability, simplicity and effectiveness.
LanguageData.DW_Agripinaa_Revolver.label: Agripinaa Quickdraw Stub Revolver
LanguageData.DW_Agripinaa_Revolver.description: A surprisingly weighty, high-calibre pistol, the stopping power of an Agripinaa stub revolver belies its compact size.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_BracedAutogun_VIII.label: BARG Bullet
LanguageData.DW_BracedAutogun_VIII.label: Agripinaa Braced Autogun Mk VIII
LanguageData.DW_BracedAutogun_VIII.description: Exchanging the iron sights of the better known Agripinaa autogun for a heavy stock and counter-balanced barrel, this weapon is well-suited for mowing down hordes of foes.
LanguageData.DW_BracedAutogun_VIII.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.DW_Bolt_Round_IIb.label: Bolt
LanguageData.DW_LockeSpearhead_Boltgun_IIb.label: Locke MKIIb Spearhead Boltgun
LanguageData.DW_LockeSpearhead_Boltgun_IIb.descriptio: Locke-pattern boltguns are known for their reliability and stopping power.
LanguageData.DW_Bolt_Round_III.label: Bolt
LanguageData.DW_LockeSpearhead_Boltgun_III.label: Locke Mk III Spearhead Boltgun
LanguageData.DW_LockeSpearhead_Boltgun_III.descriptio: Boasting a sleeker design than the Mk IIb, the Locke Mk III nonetheless does not compromise on power.
LanguageData.DW_BoltPistol_Bolt_IV.label: Bolt
LanguageData.DW_Godwyn_BoltPistol_IV.label: Godwyn-Branx Mk IV Bolt Pistol
LanguageData.DW_Godwyn_BoltPistol_IV.description: This human-portable weapon still carries a terrifying punch, provided by the high-calibre mass reactive shells loaded into its clip.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_CombatShotgun.label: Buckshot
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_CombatShotgunSlug.label: Solid Slug
LanguageData.DW_Agripinaa_CombatShotgun.label: Agripinaa Mk VII Combat Shotgun
LanguageData.DW_Agripinaa_CombatShotgun.description: Combat shotguns are ideally suited for battle in the close confines of a hive city.
LanguageData.DW_Ability_Slugshot.label: Slugshot
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_CombatShotgunIncendiary.label: Incendiary Shell
LanguageData.DW_Accatran_CombatShotgun.label: Accatran Mk IX Combat Shotgun
LanguageData.DW_Accatran_CombatShotgun.description: In a packed hive tunnel this weapon can unleash some serious damage.
LanguageData.DW_Ability_IncendiaryShot.label: IncendiaryShot
LanguageData.DW_Ability_IncendiaryShot.description: Loads the weapon with one Incendiary Shell that applies Burning to enemies.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_VigilantAutogun_IX.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_IX.label: Agripinaa Mk IX Vigilant Autogun
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_IX.description: One of the newest autogun STCs to be uncovered by the Tech-Priests of Agripinaa, the Mk IX couples excellent range with a devastating burst firing mode.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_VigilantAutogun_III.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_III.label: Columnus Mk III Vigilant Autogun
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_III.description: A prized autogun pattern from the vaunted manufactorums of Vraks, the Mk III sacrifices rate of fire in favour of increased range.
LanguageData.DW_Bullet_VigilantAutogun_VII.label: Bullet
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_VII.label: Graia Mk VII Vigilant Autogun
LanguageData.DW_Vigilant_Autogun_VII.description: Heavily modified to combat snipers during siege actions, the Vraks Headhunter is an unusual single-shot autogun designed for high-accuracy takedowns.
LanguageData.DW_Laser_InfantryLasgun_XII.label: Laser
LanguageData.DW_InfantryLasgun_XII.label: Kantrael MG XII Infantry Lasgun
LanguageData.DW_InfantryLasgun_XII.description: With its improved charge pack and focusing array, the MG XII is amongst the most powerful lasguns to come out of the manufactorums of Kantrael
LanguageData.DW_Laser_AccatranLasgun_XII.label: Laser
LanguageData.DW_AccatranLasgun_XII.label: Accatran Mk XII Recon Lasgun
LanguageData.DW_AccatranLasgun_XII.description: The Mk VI series is an evolutionary offshoot of the Mk IV, so beloved of the Elysian Drop Troops. The improved rate of fire from its more efficient charge pack comes at the expense of stopping power.
